response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development in the last 8+ years beyond a brief role at National Instruments in 2014–2015; core requirements like C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, and industrial automation are unmet, with dominant experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang instead.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and organizing technical workshops
Proven experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
concerns: Lacks recent or substantial C++ production experience required for the role
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocol expertise
Primary stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not embedded or industrial automation
